title: Phrog Parasite

moves.title: Infect
effects: Add 3 Infection cards to player's discard pile

move_pattern: Starts with Infect, then alternates: Infect -> Lash -> Infect (repeating).
notes: Starts with Infested 4 power. Adds Infection status cards to the player's discard pile. A random branch state exists in the move list but the fixed follow-up cycle is used.
